title: paeonia feminea var. banatica
intro: Paeonia feminea var. banatica, also known as Paeonia banatica, is a species of flowering plant in the Paeoniaceae family, native to Europe. The plant is used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and glycoside content. The health benefits of Paeonia banatica include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep, and exerting a sedative effect on the nervous system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots and rhizomes are typically used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
